title: Make-Believes
content:
When I was young and well and glad,
    I used to play at being sad;
    Now youth and health are fled away,
    At being glad I sometimes play.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Fuller Murray delivers a powerful performance in "Make-Believes"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
